name: G-2 source-organized file format: every shipped generated-code-quality-standards/<namespace>/<file>.yaml declares the source: header, rules: array, recommended_set, all_set
command: n=0; ok=0; for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/{node,react,typescript,google}/*.yaml; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; n=$((n+1)); grep -qE '^source:' "$f" && grep -qE '^rules:' "$f" && grep -qE '^recommended_set:' "$f" && grep -qE '^all_set:' "$f" && ok=$((ok+1)); done; [ "$n" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ok" -eq "$n" ] && echo "structural_keys_present=$ok/$n" 1>&2
